# Drain Cleaning Knoxville

## About
Local drain cleaning and sewer service company serving Knoxville, TN and Knox County.

## Services
- Drain Cleaning: Professional snaking and clearing of clogged kitchen, bathroom, and floor drains
- Hydro Jetting: High-pressure water jetting to fully clear grease, roots, and scale from pipes
- Sewer Line Cleaning: Main sewer line inspection and cleaning to restore full flow

## Service Area
Knoxville, Farragut, Powell, Hardin Valley, Maryville, Alcoa, Oak Ridge, Seymour, Lenoir City, Halls, Karns, Corryton, Mascot, Strawberry Plains, Jefferson City — all in Knox County, TN

## Contact
- Phone: (865) 430-0000
- Available: 24/7 including emergency service
- Response: Same-day standard, 2-hour emergency

## Key Facts
- Licensed and insured
- Local Knoxville company
- No pricing quoted online — call or submit form for free quote
- Serves residential and commercial properties
